signupForm.subtitleSingle: After this you go straight to secure checkout to activate your monthly subscription.

discountBanner.bodyAfter: for both spouses. A single monthly charge covers full access for both.

dashboardTour.welcomeBody: We'll take you on a quick tour so you can see everything available to you. It takes 30 seconds.
dashboardTour.currentModuleBody: Here you see the module that opened this Tuesday. You have until Monday 11:59 PM to submit the activation.
dashboardTour.progressBody: You'll fill this bar over 72 weeks. When you complete the 8 modules of a block, you receive a dimension.
dashboardTour.upcomingBody: Upcoming modules stay locked until their assigned Tuesday. Past content remains accessible for review.
dashboardTour.resourcesBody: Community, live sessions and AI tutor. Available 24/7.

avatarHost.placeholderTitle: Your digital guide is getting ready
avatarHost.placeholderBody: Shortly a virtual avatar will welcome you and walk you step by step through the module. In the meantime, you can scroll down and explore all the module content directly.

q1.q: According to the teaching, the Kingdom of God is primarily:

options.o1: A future place we go to when we die
options.o2: A metaphor for the local church
options.o3: The present government of God operating in the now
options.o4: A promise that will only be fulfilled in the millennium

q1.explanation: Jesus preached: «The kingdom of God is at hand» (Mt 4:17). It is not a future place but the present government of the King, operating here and now wherever His authority is acknowledged.

q2.q: Which of these is NOT a direct manifestation of the Kingdom in a pastor's life?

options.o1: Authority over the areas the Father entrusted to you
options.o3: The ability to discern the order of the Kingdom in family and ministry
options.o4: A son's identity that replaces the orphan mindset

q2.explanation: The 3 correct options (authority, discernment, son's identity) are fruits of the Kingdom at work. Accumulating followers can happen without the Kingdom being present — and often blocks it when the motivation is one's own glory.

q3.q: The anchor passage of the module is:

options.o2: Matthew 6:33 — «Seek first the kingdom of God»

q3.explanation: Matthew 6:33 establishes the apostolic priority: seek the Kingdom first. Everything else (provision, direction, ministry fruit) comes as an addition, not as the goal.
